records.m_Talk_ENG: So you smashed your nose against a utility pole after slipping in the rain while walking?
records.m_Talk_DEU: So you smashed your nose against a utility pole after slipping in the rain while walking?
records.m_Talk_FRA: So you smashed your nose against a utility pole after slipping in the rain while walking?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Correct.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Correct.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Correct.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then you fell onto a board and raced downhill on it?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then you fell onto a board and raced downhill on it?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then you fell onto a board and raced downhill on it?

records.m_Talk_ENG: It is a common occurrence.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It is a common occurrence.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It is a common occurrence.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Crashing into a fire hydrant while accelerating... Then flying straight into the air, getting electrocuted after getting caught in the electric wire... Falling on top of a moving bus, causing the startled bus driver to suddenly stop, and flying straight ahead...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Crashing into a fire hydrant while accelerating... Then flying straight into the air, getting electrocuted after getting caught in the electric wire... Falling on top of a moving bus, causing the startled bus driver to suddenly stop, and flying straight ahead...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Crashing into a fire hydrant while accelerating... Then flying straight into the air, getting electrocuted after getting caught in the electric wire... Falling on top of a moving bus, causing the startled bus driver to suddenly stop, and flying straight ahead...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm... Anyway, it looks like you got into six more accidents after that.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm... Anyway, it looks like you got into six more accidents after that.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm... Anyway, it looks like you got into six more accidents after that.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What more is there for me to say?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What more is there for me to say?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What more is there for me to say?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Doctor! Is Momo okay?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Doctor! Is Momo okay?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Doctor! Is Momo okay?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Reading what's written here, it should take about six months to fully heal.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Reading what's written here, it should take about six months to fully heal.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Reading what's written here, it should take about six months to fully heal.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Six months? Is she hurt that severely?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Six months? Is she hurt that severely?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Six months? Is she hurt that severely?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: To put it more bluntly... It's a miracle she's still alive.
records.m_Talk_DEU: To put it more bluntly... It's a miracle she's still alive.
records.m_Talk_FRA: To put it more bluntly... It's a miracle she's still alive.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I... bought Momo a piece of candy on the way.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I... bought Momo a piece of candy on the way.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I... bought Momo a piece of candy on the way.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Could the sugar have negative effects on her injuries?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Could the sugar have negative effects on her injuries?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Could the sugar have negative effects on her injuries?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Y-you don't have to worry that much. According to the examinations, there's nothing wrong with her.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Y-you don't have to worry that much. According to the examinations, there's nothing wrong with her.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Y-you don't have to worry that much. According to the examinations, there's nothing wrong with her.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Of course, there's not! I am a Demon Lord!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Of course, there's not! I am a Demon Lord!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Of course, there's not! I am a Demon Lord!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Phew, that's good to hear. Guess she got lucky again.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Phew, that's good to hear. Guess she got lucky again.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Phew, that's good to hear. Guess she got lucky again.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I don't think it's luck. This is her ninth visit to the hospital this month.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I don't think it's luck. This is her ninth visit to the hospital this month.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I don't think it's luck. This is her ninth visit to the hospital this month.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I don't believe in superstitions, but I strongly advise you to take her to see a shaman.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I don't believe in superstitions, but I strongly advise you to take her to see a shaman.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I don't believe in superstitions, but I strongly advise you to take her to see a shaman.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm? Medical insurance?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm? Medical insurance?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm? Medical insurance?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yes, the doctor recommended a few just to be safe.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yes, the doctor recommended a few just to be safe.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yes, the doctor recommended a few just to be safe.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm... There are all kinds of insurance these days. There are even ones with special conditions for going missing on dives.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm... There are all kinds of insurance these days. There are even ones with special conditions for going missing on dives.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm... There are all kinds of insurance these days. There are even ones with special conditions for going missing on dives.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Gremory, are you going out today?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Gremory, are you going out today?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Gremory, are you going out today?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh, did you notice?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh, did you notice?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh, did you notice?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Well, you seem less drunk than usual.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Well, you seem less drunk than usual.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Well, you seem less drunk than usual.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hah hah, you're so keen that I can't lie to you, Nicole.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hah hah, you're so keen that I can't lie to you, Nicole.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hah hah, you're so keen that I can't lie to you, Nicole.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm thinking of going to the comic book store with our little majesty.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm thinking of going to the comic book store with our little majesty.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm thinking of going to the comic book store with our little majesty.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The comic book store with Momo?
records.m_Talk_DEU: The comic book store with Momo?
records.m_Talk_FRA: The comic book store with Momo?

records.m_Talk_ENG: If there are any books you want, let me know. I'll buy them for you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If there are any books you want, let me know. I'll buy them for you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If there are any books you want, let me know. I'll buy them for you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's all right. Sales are low these days, so I was thinking of researching new cocktail recipes.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's all right. Sales are low these days, so I was thinking of researching new cocktail recipes.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's all right. Sales are low these days, so I was thinking of researching new cocktail recipes.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What a bother.
records.m_Talk_DEU: What a bother.
records.m_Talk_FRA: What a bother.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'll buy you candy.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'll buy you candy.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'll buy you candy.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Nicole, it is your duty to manage the shop while I'm not here.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Nicole, it is your duty to manage the shop while I'm not here.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Nicole, it is your duty to manage the shop while I'm not here.

records.m_Talk_ENG: We'll be back before sundown. Until then, you are in charge here.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We'll be back before sundown. Until then, you are in charge here.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We'll be back before sundown. Until then, you are in charge here.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Of course. Don't worry and have fun.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Of course. Don't worry and have fun.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Of course. Don't worry and have fun.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Since Momo is with Gremory, I won't have to worry about her for a while.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Since Momo is with Gremory, I won't have to worry about her for a while.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Since Momo is with Gremory, I won't have to worry about her for a while.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Now, maybe I should slice some lemons before our guests arrive.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Now, maybe I should slice some lemons before our guests arrive.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Now, maybe I should slice some lemons before our guests arrive.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But what if Gremory gets absorbed into reading comics and leaves Momo all alone...
records.m_Talk_DEU: But what if Gremory gets absorbed into reading comics and leaves Momo all alone...
records.m_Talk_FRA: But what if Gremory gets absorbed into reading comics and leaves Momo all alone...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ugh, let's stop worrying about nothing. Those two were fine even before I joined this bar.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ugh, let's stop worrying about nothing. Those two were fine even before I joined this bar.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ugh, let's stop worrying about nothing. Those two were fine even before I joined this bar.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm sure they'll do just fine without me.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm sure they'll do just fine without me.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm sure they'll do just fine without me.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Just fine... without me.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Just fine... without me.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Just fine... without me.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh, welcome!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh, welcome!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh, welcome!

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's so quiet in here. Am I your first customer?
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's so quiet in here. Am I your first customer?
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's so quiet in here. Am I your first customer?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yes, please have a seat. What can I get you today?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yes, please have a seat. What can I get you today?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yes, please have a seat. What can I get you today?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'll have the usual.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'll have the usual.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'll have the usual.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You're here earlier than usual.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You're here earlier than usual.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You're here earlier than usual.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Work ended earlier than scheduled. It's not because I'm unemployed or anything.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Work ended earlier than scheduled. It's not because I'm unemployed or anything.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Work ended earlier than scheduled. It's not because I'm unemployed or anything.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I think it's great that you can enjoy your free time no matter what job you have.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I think it's great that you can enjoy your free time no matter what job you have.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I think it's great that you can enjoy your free time no matter what job you have.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Doesn't matter how hard you work to make money, because what fills a person's heart is a leisurely glass of alcohol.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Doesn't matter how hard you work to make money, because what fills a person's heart is a leisurely glass of alcohol.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Doesn't matter how hard you work to make money, because what fills a person's heart is a leisurely glass of alcohol.

records.m_Talk_ENG:
That
8ks an interesting expression.
records.m_Talk_DEU:
That
8ks an interesting expression.
records.m_Talk_FRA:
That
8ks an interesting expression.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hehe, I'm just quoting from a book I read once.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hehe, I'm just quoting from a book I read once.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hehe, I'm just quoting from a book I read once.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I see. So do you enjoy reading literature?
records.m_Talk_DEU: I see. So do you enjoy reading literature?
records.m_Talk_FRA: I see. So do you enjoy reading literature?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ah hah hah... Something like that.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ah hah hah... Something like that.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ah hah hah... Something like that.

records.m_Talk_ENG: (Agh, I can't tell him that it's a quote from a romance comic book.)
records.m_Talk_DEU: (Agh, I can't tell him that it's a quote from a romance comic book.)
records.m_Talk_FRA: (Agh, I can't tell him that it's a quote from a romance comic book.)

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...This cocktail tastes a little different from what I used to have.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...This cocktail tastes a little different from what I used to have.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...This cocktail tastes a little different from what I used to have.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh, really? I'm sorry! I'll make you a new one right away!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh, really? I'm sorry! I'll make you a new one right away!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh, really? I'm sorry! I'll make you a new one right away!

records.m_Talk_ENG: There's no need to rush.
records.m_Talk_DEU: There's no need to rush.
records.m_Talk_FRA: There's no need to rush.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Pardon?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Pardon?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Pardon?

records.m_Talk_ENG: If you have any lingering concerns, they're bound to get mixed in with the cocktail.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If you have any lingering concerns, they're bound to get mixed in with the cocktail.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If you have any lingering concerns, they're bound to get mixed in with the cocktail.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If it's okay, why don't you talk to me about it?
records.m_Talk_DEU: If it's okay, why don't you talk to me about it?
records.m_Talk_FRA: If it's okay, why don't you talk to me about it?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Talk? About what?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Talk? About what?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Talk? About what?

records.m_Talk_ENG: About what you're concerned with.
records.m_Talk_DEU: About what you're concerned with.
records.m_Talk_FRA: About what you're concerned with.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Customers can listen to a bartender's worries. What do you think?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Customers can listen to a bartender's worries. What do you think?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Customers can listen to a bartender's worries. What do you think?

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Thank you. But I'm good. Really.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Thank you. But I'm good. Really.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Thank you. But I'm good. Really.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You don't want to make your customer feel uncomfortable with your personal matters?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You don't want to make your customer feel uncomfortable with your personal matters?
records.m_Talk_FRA: You don't want to make your customer feel uncomfortable with your personal matters?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ah hah hah... I guess?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ah hah hah... I guess?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ah hah hah... I guess?

records.m_Talk_ENG: (I can't tell that an exorcist from the Holy Curia is taking care of a devil!)
records.m_Talk_DEU: (I can't tell that an exorcist from the Holy Curia is taking care of a devil!)
records.m_Talk_FRA: (I can't tell that an exorcist from the Holy Curia is taking care of a devil!)

records.m_Talk_ENG: I suppose a kind bartender like you would be more than considerate.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I suppose a kind bartender like you would be more than considerate.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I suppose a kind bartender like you would be more than considerate.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But it's not a good habit to keep your worries inside.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But it's not a good habit to keep your worries inside.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But it's not a good habit to keep your worries inside.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If there are any similarities between worries and alcohol, it's that they should be shared.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If there are any similarities between worries and alcohol, it's that they should be shared.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If there are any similarities between worries and alcohol, it's that they should be shared.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Because when shared, worries lessen, and alcohol tastes better.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Because when shared, worries lessen, and alcohol tastes better.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Because when shared, worries lessen, and alcohol tastes better.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Wow, that's a really good way to put it.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Wow, that's a really good way to put it.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Wow, that's a really good way to put it.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm just quoting a line I read from an internet novel.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm just quoting a line I read from an internet novel.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm just quoting a line I read from an internet novel.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Pfft! An internet novel?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Pfft! An internet novel?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Pfft! An internet novel?

records.m_Talk_ENG: See? It's so much better to see a genuine smile rather than a business smile, don't you think?
records.m_Talk_DEU: See? It's so much better to see a genuine smile rather than a business smile, don't you think?
records.m_Talk_FRA: See? It's so much better to see a genuine smile rather than a business smile, don't you think?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm sorry. But it's not something I can just talk to anyone about.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm sorry. But it's not something I can just talk to anyone about.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm sorry. But it's not something I can just talk to anyone about.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's not because I don't want to be sincere with you. I hope you understand.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's not because I don't want to be sincere with you. I hope you understand.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's not because I don't want to be sincere with you. I hope you understand.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's fine with it being vague.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's fine with it being vague.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's fine with it being vague.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What's important is that you let it out, no matter the method.
records.m_Talk_DEU: What's important is that you let it out, no matter the method.
records.m_Talk_FRA: What's important is that you let it out, no matter the method.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Mm... Maybe I should say that I'm not certain?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Mm... Maybe I should say that I'm not certain?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Mm... Maybe I should say that I'm not certain?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Certain?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Certain?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Certain?

records.m_Talk_ENG: About if what I'm doing is right... If it's okay to keep living like this... That sort of certainty.
records.m_Talk_DEU: About if what I'm doing is right... If it's okay to keep living like this... That sort of certainty.
records.m_Talk_FRA: About if what I'm doing is right... If it's okay to keep living like this... That sort of certainty.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Even though I know that it's wrong... Maybe I'm just forcing myself to ignore the truth.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Even though I know that it's wrong... Maybe I'm just forcing myself to ignore the truth.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Even though I know that it's wrong... Maybe I'm just forcing myself to ignore the truth.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Eventually, I'll regret my decision, and figure out that... I'm a coward who can't face the consequences.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Eventually, I'll regret my decision, and figure out that... I'm a coward who can't face the consequences.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Eventually, I'll regret my decision, and figure out that... I'm a coward who can't face the consequences.

records.m_Talk_ENG: A decision you'll regret, you say?
records.m_Talk_DEU: A decision you'll regret, you say?
records.m_Talk_FRA: A decision you'll regret, you say?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Tell me. Do you have the ability to turn back time?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Tell me. Do you have the ability to turn back time?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Tell me. Do you have the ability to turn back time?

records.m_Talk_ENG: No, of course not.
records.m_Talk_DEU: No, of course not.
records.m_Talk_FRA: No, of course not.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Is that even possible?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Is that even possible?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Is that even possible?

records.m_Talk_ENG: So, why are you concerned about making a decision that you cannot reverse?
records.m_Talk_DEU: So, why are you concerned about making a decision that you cannot reverse?
records.m_Talk_FRA: So, why are you concerned about making a decision that you cannot reverse?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm afraid that my decision is going to hurt someone.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm afraid that my decision is going to hurt someone.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm afraid that my decision is going to hurt someone.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Is there an option where no one gets hurt?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Is there an option where no one gets hurt?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Is there an option where no one gets hurt?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I think... this is like an uneven scale.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I think... this is like an uneven scale.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I think... this is like an uneven scale.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It has no choice but to lean to one side.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It has no choice but to lean to one side.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It has no choice but to lean to one side.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then, it seems that you already have your answer.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then, it seems that you already have your answer.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then, it seems that you already have your answer.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Huh? I do?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Huh? I do?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Huh? I do?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Sure. If there is no reversing it, all that's left is to move forward in the path you think is right, no?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Sure. If there is no reversing it, all that's left is to move forward in the path you think is right, no?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Sure. If there is no reversing it, all that's left is to move forward in the path you think is right, no?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Tests on paper may have a correct answer, but problems in real life do not.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Tests on paper may have a correct answer, but problems in real life do not.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Tests on paper may have a correct answer, but problems in real life do not.

records.m_Talk_ENG: When the time comes to make a decision, what's important is that you choose what you think is right.
records.m_Talk_DEU: When the time comes to make a decision, what's important is that you choose what you think is right.
records.m_Talk_FRA: When the time comes to make a decision, what's important is that you choose what you think is right.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Do you think I can handle it? Even if... that decision will betray the people who trust me?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Do you think I can handle it? Even if... that decision will betray the people who trust me?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Do you think I can handle it? Even if... that decision will betray the people who trust me?

records.m_Talk_ENG: There are times when a person must keep moving despite knowing that what lies ahead is a difficult path.
records.m_Talk_DEU: There are times when a person must keep moving despite knowing that what lies ahead is a difficult path.
records.m_Talk_FRA: There are times when a person must keep moving despite knowing that what lies ahead is a difficult path.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Just remember not to let regrets ruin what you've already decided on.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Just remember not to let regrets ruin what you've already decided on.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Just remember not to let regrets ruin what you've already decided on.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So, if you know you're going to hurt someone, be fully prepared for it.
records.m_Talk_DEU: So, if you know you're going to hurt someone, be fully prepared for it.
records.m_Talk_FRA: So, if you know you're going to hurt someone, be fully prepared for it.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Have you ever regretted a decision... that you couldn't undo?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Have you ever regretted a decision... that you couldn't undo?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Have you ever regretted a decision... that you couldn't undo?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Making a decision is in the moment, but the responsibility it entails will follow you for a lifetime.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Making a decision is in the moment, but the responsibility it entails will follow you for a lifetime.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Making a decision is in the moment, but the responsibility it entails will follow you for a lifetime.

records.m_Talk_ENG: In the end, regrets will only make me feel the weight of my karma.
records.m_Talk_DEU: In the end, regrets will only make me feel the weight of my karma.
records.m_Talk_FRA: In the end, regrets will only make me feel the weight of my karma.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If choices are like an uneven scale, regrets are what make both sides lighter.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If choices are like an uneven scale, regrets are what make both sides lighter.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If choices are like an uneven scale, regrets are what make both sides lighter.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And I've lived long enough to know not to do something so irresponsible.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And I've lived long enough to know not to do something so irresponsible.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And I've lived long enough to know not to do something so irresponsible.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...I see. So adults like us shouldn't have regrets.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...I see. So adults like us shouldn't have regrets.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...I see. So adults like us shouldn't have regrets.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm? I didn't say that adults shouldn't have regrets.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm? I didn't say that adults shouldn't have regrets.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm? I didn't say that adults shouldn't have regrets.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Huh? But you and I seem to be around the same age...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Huh? But you and I seem to be around the same age...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Huh? But you and I seem to be around the same age...

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Or you look surprisingly young for your age.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Or you look surprisingly young for your age.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Or you look surprisingly young for your age.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Thanks. I get that a lot.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Thanks. I get that a lot.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Thanks. I get that a lot.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh, your glass is empty, sir.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh, your glass is empty, sir.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh, your glass is empty, sir.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The next one is on me. In return for giving me advice.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The next one is on me. In return for giving me advice.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The next one is on me. In return for giving me advice.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I wouldn't call it advice, as half of it was me talking about my past.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I wouldn't call it advice, as half of it was me talking about my past.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I wouldn't call it advice, as half of it was me talking about my past.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But I'm not one to turn down free drinks.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But I'm not one to turn down free drinks.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But I'm not one to turn down free drinks.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hehe. What will it be?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hehe. What will it be?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hehe. What will it be?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'll have your favorite drink.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'll have your favorite drink.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'll have your favorite drink.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Sure thing!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Sure thing!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Sure thing!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oops?! I ruined it again.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oops?! I ruined it again.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oops?! I ruined it again.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm sorry. I wanted to make you a pretty cocktail, but I can't seem to make a float today.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm sorry. I wanted to make you a pretty cocktail, but I can't seem to make a float today.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm sorry. I wanted to make you a pretty cocktail, but I can't seem to make a float today.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's no reason to throw out a good cocktail. Give it here.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's no reason to throw out a good cocktail. Give it here.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's no reason to throw out a good cocktail. Give it here.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Huh? Are you sure about that? It's all mixed up, so it won't taste that great.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Huh? Are you sure about that? It's all mixed up, so it won't taste that great.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Huh? Are you sure about that? It's all mixed up, so it won't taste that great.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's all right. Mixed or not, I'll get drunk either way.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's all right. Mixed or not, I'll get drunk either way.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's all right. Mixed or not, I'll get drunk either way.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If you insist...
records.m_Talk_DEU: If you insist...
records.m_Talk_FRA: If you insist...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh! What you said just now, does it also have a deeper meaning?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh! What you said just now, does it also have a deeper meaning?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh! What you said just now, does it also have a deeper meaning?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Just like getting drunk on ruined drinks, even confusing experiences are still worth something?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Just like getting drunk on ruined drinks, even confusing experiences are still worth something?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Just like getting drunk on ruined drinks, even confusing experiences are still worth something?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: No... I didn't imply anything like that...
records.m_Talk_DEU: No... I didn't imply anything like that...
records.m_Talk_FRA: No... I didn't imply anything like that...

records.m_Talk_ENG: R-really? Oh...
records.m_Talk_DEU: R-really? Oh...
records.m_Talk_FRA: R-really? Oh...

records.m_Talk_ENG: But I'm sure this ruined cocktail has its own charm.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But I'm sure this ruined cocktail has its own charm.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But I'm sure this ruined cocktail has its own charm.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm lucky to have met a bartender like you, Ms. Nicole.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm lucky to have met a bartender like you, Ms. Nicole.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm lucky to have met a bartender like you, Ms. Nicole.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Thank you, sir!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Thank you, sir!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Thank you, sir!

root.m_Talk_ENG: So you smashed your nose against a utility pole after slipping in the rain while walking?
root.m_Talk_DEU: So you smashed your nose against a utility pole after slipping in the rain while walking?
root.m_Talk_FRA: So you smashed your nose against a utility pole after slipping in the rain while walking?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Correct.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Correct.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Correct.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Then you fell onto a board and raced downhill on it?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Then you fell onto a board and raced downhill on it?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Then you fell onto a board and raced downhill on it?

root.m_Talk_ENG: It is a common occurrence.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It is a common occurrence.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It is a common occurrence.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Crashing into a fire hydrant while accelerating... Then flying straight into the air, getting electrocuted after getting caught in the electric wire... Falling on top of a moving bus, causing the startled bus driver to suddenly stop, and flying straight ahead...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Crashing into a fire hydrant while accelerating... Then flying straight into the air, getting electrocuted after getting caught in the electric wire... Falling on top of a moving bus, causing the startled bus driver to suddenly stop, and flying straight ahead...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Crashing into a fire hydrant while accelerating... Then flying straight into the air, getting electrocuted after getting caught in the electric wire... Falling on top of a moving bus, causing the startled bus driver to suddenly stop, and flying straight ahead...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm... Anyway, it looks like you got into six more accidents after that.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm... Anyway, it looks like you got into six more accidents after that.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm... Anyway, it looks like you got into six more accidents after that.

root.m_Talk_ENG: What more is there for me to say?
root.m_Talk_DEU: What more is there for me to say?
root.m_Talk_FRA: What more is there for me to say?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Doctor! Is Momo okay?!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Doctor! Is Momo okay?!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Doctor! Is Momo okay?!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Reading what's written here, it should take about six months to fully heal.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Reading what's written here, it should take about six months to fully heal.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Reading what's written here, it should take about six months to fully heal.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Six months? Is she hurt that severely?!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Six months? Is she hurt that severely?!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Six months? Is she hurt that severely?!

root.m_Talk_ENG: To put it more bluntly... It's a miracle she's still alive.
root.m_Talk_DEU: To put it more bluntly... It's a miracle she's still alive.
root.m_Talk_FRA: To put it more bluntly... It's a miracle she's still alive.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I... bought Momo a piece of candy on the way.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I... bought Momo a piece of candy on the way.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I... bought Momo a piece of candy on the way.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Could the sugar have negative effects on her injuries?!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Could the sugar have negative effects on her injuries?!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Could the sugar have negative effects on her injuries?!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Y-you don't have to worry that much. According to the examinations, there's nothing wrong with her.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Y-you don't have to worry that much. According to the examinations, there's nothing wrong with her.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Y-you don't have to worry that much. According to the examinations, there's nothing wrong with her.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Of course, there's not! I am a Demon Lord!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Of course, there's not! I am a Demon Lord!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Of course, there's not! I am a Demon Lord!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Phew, that's good to hear. Guess she got lucky again.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Phew, that's good to hear. Guess she got lucky again.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Phew, that's good to hear. Guess she got lucky again.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I don't think it's luck. This is her ninth visit to the hospital this month.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I don't think it's luck. This is her ninth visit to the hospital this month.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I don't think it's luck. This is her ninth visit to the hospital this month.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I don't believe in superstitions, but I strongly advise you to take her to see a shaman.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I don't believe in superstitions, but I strongly advise you to take her to see a shaman.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I don't believe in superstitions, but I strongly advise you to take her to see a shaman.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm? Medical insurance?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm? Medical insurance?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm? Medical insurance?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Yes, the doctor recommended a few just to be safe.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Yes, the doctor recommended a few just to be safe.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Yes, the doctor recommended a few just to be safe.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm... There are all kinds of insurance these days. There are even ones with special conditions for going missing on dives.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm... There are all kinds of insurance these days. There are even ones with special conditions for going missing on dives.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm... There are all kinds of insurance these days. There are even ones with special conditions for going missing on dives.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Gremory, are you going out today?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Gremory, are you going out today?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Gremory, are you going out today?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Oh, did you notice?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Oh, did you notice?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Oh, did you notice?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Well, you seem less drunk than usual.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Well, you seem less drunk than usual.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Well, you seem less drunk than usual.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hah hah, you're so keen that I can't lie to you, Nicole.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hah hah, you're so keen that I can't lie to you, Nicole.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hah hah, you're so keen that I can't lie to you, Nicole.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'm thinking of going to the comic book store with our little majesty.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'm thinking of going to the comic book store with our little majesty.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'm thinking of going to the comic book store with our little majesty.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The comic book store with Momo?
root.m_Talk_DEU: The comic book store with Momo?
root.m_Talk_FRA: The comic book store with Momo?

root.m_Talk_ENG: If there are any books you want, let me know. I'll buy them for you.
root.m_Talk_DEU: If there are any books you want, let me know. I'll buy them for you.
root.m_Talk_FRA: If there are any books you want, let me know. I'll buy them for you.

root.m_Talk_ENG: It's all right. Sales are low these days, so I was thinking of researching new cocktail recipes.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It's all right. Sales are low these days, so I was thinking of researching new cocktail recipes.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It's all right. Sales are low these days, so I was thinking of researching new cocktail recipes.

root.m_Talk_ENG: What a bother.
root.m_Talk_DEU: What a bother.
root.m_Talk_FRA: What a bother.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'll buy you candy.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'll buy you candy.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'll buy you candy.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Nicole, it is your duty to manage the shop while I'm not here.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Nicole, it is your duty to manage the shop while I'm not here.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Nicole, it is your duty to manage the shop while I'm not here.

root.m_Talk_ENG: We'll be back before sundown. Until then, you are in charge here.
root.m_Talk_DEU: We'll be back before sundown. Until then, you are in charge here.
root.m_Talk_FRA: We'll be back before sundown. Until then, you are in charge here.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Of course. Don't worry and have fun.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Of course. Don't worry and have fun.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Of course. Don't worry and have fun.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Since Momo is with Gremory, I won't have to worry about her for a while.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Since Momo is with Gremory, I won't have to worry about her for a while.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Since Momo is with Gremory, I won't have to worry about her for a while.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Now, maybe I should slice some lemons before our guests arrive.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Now, maybe I should slice some lemons before our guests arrive.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Now, maybe I should slice some lemons before our guests arrive.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But what if Gremory gets absorbed into reading comics and leaves Momo all alone...
root.m_Talk_DEU: But what if Gremory gets absorbed into reading comics and leaves Momo all alone...
root.m_Talk_FRA: But what if Gremory gets absorbed into reading comics and leaves Momo all alone...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ugh, let's stop worrying about nothing. Those two were fine even before I joined this bar.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ugh, let's stop worrying about nothing. Those two were fine even before I joined this bar.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ugh, let's stop worrying about nothing. Those two were fine even before I joined this bar.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'm sure they'll do just fine without me.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'm sure they'll do just fine without me.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'm sure they'll do just fine without me.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Just fine... without me.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Just fine... without me.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Just fine... without me.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Oh, welcome!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Oh, welcome!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Oh, welcome!

root.m_Talk_ENG: It's so quiet in here. Am I your first customer?
root.m_Talk_DEU: It's so quiet in here. Am I your first customer?
root.m_Talk_FRA: It's so quiet in here. Am I your first customer?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Yes, please have a seat. What can I get you today?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Yes, please have a seat. What can I get you today?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Yes, please have a seat. What can I get you today?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'll have the usual.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'll have the usual.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'll have the usual.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You're here earlier than usual.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You're here earlier than usual.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You're here earlier than usual.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Work ended earlier than scheduled. It's not because I'm unemployed or anything.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Work ended earlier than scheduled. It's not because I'm unemployed or anything.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Work ended earlier than scheduled. It's not because I'm unemployed or anything.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I think it's great that you can enjoy your free time no matter what job you have.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I think it's great that you can enjoy your free time no matter what job you have.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I think it's great that you can enjoy your free time no matter what job you have.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Doesn't matter how hard you work to make money, because what fills a person's heart is a leisurely glass of alcohol.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Doesn't matter how hard you work to make money, because what fills a person's heart is a leisurely glass of alcohol.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Doesn't matter how hard you work to make money, because what fills a person's heart is a leisurely glass of alcohol.

root.m_Talk_ENG:
That
8ks an interesting expression.
root.m_Talk_DEU:
That
8ks an interesting expression.
root.m_Talk_FRA:
That
8ks an interesting expression.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hehe, I'm just quoting from a book I read once.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hehe, I'm just quoting from a book I read once.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hehe, I'm just quoting from a book I read once.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I see. So do you enjoy reading literature?
root.m_Talk_DEU: I see. So do you enjoy reading literature?
root.m_Talk_FRA: I see. So do you enjoy reading literature?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ah hah hah... Something like that.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ah hah hah... Something like that.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ah hah hah... Something like that.

root.m_Talk_ENG: (Agh, I can't tell him that it's a quote from a romance comic book.)
root.m_Talk_DEU: (Agh, I can't tell him that it's a quote from a romance comic book.)
root.m_Talk_FRA: (Agh, I can't tell him that it's a quote from a romance comic book.)

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...This cocktail tastes a little different from what I used to have.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...This cocktail tastes a little different from what I used to have.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...This cocktail tastes a little different from what I used to have.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Oh, really? I'm sorry! I'll make you a new one right away!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Oh, really? I'm sorry! I'll make you a new one right away!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Oh, really? I'm sorry! I'll make you a new one right away!

root.m_Talk_ENG: There's no need to rush.
root.m_Talk_DEU: There's no need to rush.
root.m_Talk_FRA: There's no need to rush.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Pardon?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Pardon?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Pardon?

root.m_Talk_ENG: If you have any lingering concerns, they're bound to get mixed in with the cocktail.
root.m_Talk_DEU: If you have any lingering concerns, they're bound to get mixed in with the cocktail.
root.m_Talk_FRA: If you have any lingering concerns, they're bound to get mixed in with the cocktail.

root.m_Talk_ENG: If it's okay, why don't you talk to me about it?
root.m_Talk_DEU: If it's okay, why don't you talk to me about it?
root.m_Talk_FRA: If it's okay, why don't you talk to me about it?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Talk? About what?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Talk? About what?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Talk? About what?

root.m_Talk_ENG: About what you're concerned with.
root.m_Talk_DEU: About what you're concerned with.
root.m_Talk_FRA: About what you're concerned with.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Customers can listen to a bartender's worries. What do you think?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Customers can listen to a bartender's worries. What do you think?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Customers can listen to a bartender's worries. What do you think?

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...Thank you. But I'm good. Really.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...Thank you. But I'm good. Really.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...Thank you. But I'm good. Really.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You don't want to make your customer feel uncomfortable with your personal matters?
root.m_Talk_DEU: You don't want to make your customer feel uncomfortable with your personal matters?
root.m_Talk_FRA: You don't want to make your customer feel uncomfortable with your personal matters?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ah hah hah... I guess?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ah hah hah... I guess?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ah hah hah... I guess?

root.m_Talk_ENG: (I can't tell that an exorcist from the Holy Curia is taking care of a devil!)
root.m_Talk_DEU: (I can't tell that an exorcist from the Holy Curia is taking care of a devil!)
root.m_Talk_FRA: (I can't tell that an exorcist from the Holy Curia is taking care of a devil!)

root.m_Talk_ENG: I suppose a kind bartender like you would be more than considerate.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I suppose a kind bartender like you would be more than considerate.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I suppose a kind bartender like you would be more than considerate.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But it's not a good habit to keep your worries inside.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But it's not a good habit to keep your worries inside.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But it's not a good habit to keep your worries inside.

root.m_Talk_ENG: If there are any similarities between worries and alcohol, it's that they should be shared.
root.m_Talk_DEU: If there are any similarities between worries and alcohol, it's that they should be shared.
root.m_Talk_FRA: If there are any similarities between worries and alcohol, it's that they should be shared.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Because when shared, worries lessen, and alcohol tastes better.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Because when shared, worries lessen, and alcohol tastes better.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Because when shared, worries lessen, and alcohol tastes better.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Wow, that's a really good way to put it.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Wow, that's a really good way to put it.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Wow, that's a really good way to put it.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'm just quoting a line I read from an internet novel.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'm just quoting a line I read from an internet novel.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'm just quoting a line I read from an internet novel.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Pfft! An internet novel?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Pfft! An internet novel?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Pfft! An internet novel?

root.m_Talk_ENG: See? It's so much better to see a genuine smile rather than a business smile, don't you think?
root.m_Talk_DEU: See? It's so much better to see a genuine smile rather than a business smile, don't you think?
root.m_Talk_FRA: See? It's so much better to see a genuine smile rather than a business smile, don't you think?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'm sorry. But it's not something I can just talk to anyone about.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'm sorry. But it's not something I can just talk to anyone about.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'm sorry. But it's not something I can just talk to anyone about.

root.m_Talk_ENG: It's not because I don't want to be sincere with you. I hope you understand.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It's not because I don't want to be sincere with you. I hope you understand.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It's not because I don't want to be sincere with you. I hope you understand.

root.m_Talk_ENG: It's fine with it being vague.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It's fine with it being vague.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It's fine with it being vague.

root.m_Talk_ENG: What's important is that you let it out, no matter the method.
root.m_Talk_DEU: What's important is that you let it out, no matter the method.
root.m_Talk_FRA: What's important is that you let it out, no matter the method.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Mm... Maybe I should say that I'm not certain?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Mm... Maybe I should say that I'm not certain?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Mm... Maybe I should say that I'm not certain?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Certain?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Certain?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Certain?

root.m_Talk_ENG: About if what I'm doing is right... If it's okay to keep living like this... That sort of certainty.
root.m_Talk_DEU: About if what I'm doing is right... If it's okay to keep living like this... That sort of certainty.
root.m_Talk_FRA: About if what I'm doing is right... If it's okay to keep living like this... That sort of certainty.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Even though I know that it's wrong... Maybe I'm just forcing myself to ignore the truth.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Even though I know that it's wrong... Maybe I'm just forcing myself to ignore the truth.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Even though I know that it's wrong... Maybe I'm just forcing myself to ignore the truth.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Eventually, I'll regret my decision, and figure out that... I'm a coward who can't face the consequences.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Eventually, I'll regret my decision, and figure out that... I'm a coward who can't face the consequences.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Eventually, I'll regret my decision, and figure out that... I'm a coward who can't face the consequences.

root.m_Talk_ENG: A decision you'll regret, you say?
root.m_Talk_DEU: A decision you'll regret, you say?
root.m_Talk_FRA: A decision you'll regret, you say?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Tell me. Do you have the ability to turn back time?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Tell me. Do you have the ability to turn back time?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Tell me. Do you have the ability to turn back time?

root.m_Talk_ENG: No, of course not.
root.m_Talk_DEU: No, of course not.
root.m_Talk_FRA: No, of course not.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Is that even possible?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Is that even possible?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Is that even possible?

root.m_Talk_ENG: So, why are you concerned about making a decision that you cannot reverse?
root.m_Talk_DEU: So, why are you concerned about making a decision that you cannot reverse?
root.m_Talk_FRA: So, why are you concerned about making a decision that you cannot reverse?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'm afraid that my decision is going to hurt someone.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'm afraid that my decision is going to hurt someone.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'm afraid that my decision is going to hurt someone.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Is there an option where no one gets hurt?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Is there an option where no one gets hurt?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Is there an option where no one gets hurt?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I think... this is like an uneven scale.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I think... this is like an uneven scale.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I think... this is like an uneven scale.

root.m_Talk_ENG: It has no choice but to lean to one side.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It has no choice but to lean to one side.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It has no choice but to lean to one side.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Then, it seems that you already have your answer.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Then, it seems that you already have your answer.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Then, it seems that you already have your answer.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Huh? I do?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Huh? I do?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Huh? I do?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Sure. If there is no reversing it, all that's left is to move forward in the path you think is right, no?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Sure. If there is no reversing it, all that's left is to move forward in the path you think is right, no?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Sure. If there is no reversing it, all that's left is to move forward in the path you think is right, no?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Tests on paper may have a correct answer, but problems in real life do not.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Tests on paper may have a correct answer, but problems in real life do not.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Tests on paper may have a correct answer, but problems in real life do not.

root.m_Talk_ENG: When the time comes to make a decision, what's important is that you choose what you think is right.
root.m_Talk_DEU: When the time comes to make a decision, what's important is that you choose what you think is right.
root.m_Talk_FRA: When the time comes to make a decision, what's important is that you choose what you think is right.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Do you think I can handle it? Even if... that decision will betray the people who trust me?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Do you think I can handle it? Even if... that decision will betray the people who trust me?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Do you think I can handle it? Even if... that decision will betray the people who trust me?

root.m_Talk_ENG: There are times when a person must keep moving despite knowing that what lies ahead is a difficult path.
root.m_Talk_DEU: There are times when a person must keep moving despite knowing that what lies ahead is a difficult path.
root.m_Talk_FRA: There are times when a person must keep moving despite knowing that what lies ahead is a difficult path.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Just remember not to let regrets ruin what you've already decided on.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Just remember not to let regrets ruin what you've already decided on.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Just remember not to let regrets ruin what you've already decided on.

root.m_Talk_ENG: So, if you know you're going to hurt someone, be fully prepared for it.
root.m_Talk_DEU: So, if you know you're going to hurt someone, be fully prepared for it.
root.m_Talk_FRA: So, if you know you're going to hurt someone, be fully prepared for it.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Have you ever regretted a decision... that you couldn't undo?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Have you ever regretted a decision... that you couldn't undo?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Have you ever regretted a decision... that you couldn't undo?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Making a decision is in the moment, but the responsibility it entails will follow you for a lifetime.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Making a decision is in the moment, but the responsibility it entails will follow you for a lifetime.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Making a decision is in the moment, but the responsibility it entails will follow you for a lifetime.

root.m_Talk_ENG: In the end, regrets will only make me feel the weight of my karma.
root.m_Talk_DEU: In the end, regrets will only make me feel the weight of my karma.
root.m_Talk_FRA: In the end, regrets will only make me feel the weight of my karma.

root.m_Talk_ENG: If choices are like an uneven scale, regrets are what make both sides lighter.
root.m_Talk_DEU: If choices are like an uneven scale, regrets are what make both sides lighter.
root.m_Talk_FRA: If choices are like an uneven scale, regrets are what make both sides lighter.

root.m_Talk_ENG: And I've lived long enough to know not to do something so irresponsible.
root.m_Talk_DEU: And I've lived long enough to know not to do something so irresponsible.
root.m_Talk_FRA: And I've lived long enough to know not to do something so irresponsible.

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...I see. So adults like us shouldn't have regrets.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...I see. So adults like us shouldn't have regrets.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...I see. So adults like us shouldn't have regrets.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm? I didn't say that adults shouldn't have regrets.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm? I didn't say that adults shouldn't have regrets.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm? I didn't say that adults shouldn't have regrets.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Huh? But you and I seem to be around the same age...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Huh? But you and I seem to be around the same age...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Huh? But you and I seem to be around the same age...

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...Or you look surprisingly young for your age.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...Or you look surprisingly young for your age.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...Or you look surprisingly young for your age.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Thanks. I get that a lot.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Thanks. I get that a lot.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Thanks. I get that a lot.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Oh, your glass is empty, sir.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Oh, your glass is empty, sir.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Oh, your glass is empty, sir.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The next one is on me. In return for giving me advice.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The next one is on me. In return for giving me advice.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The next one is on me. In return for giving me advice.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I wouldn't call it advice, as half of it was me talking about my past.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I wouldn't call it advice, as half of it was me talking about my past.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I wouldn't call it advice, as half of it was me talking about my past.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But I'm not one to turn down free drinks.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But I'm not one to turn down free drinks.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But I'm not one to turn down free drinks.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hehe. What will it be?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hehe. What will it be?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hehe. What will it be?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'll have your favorite drink.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'll have your favorite drink.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'll have your favorite drink.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Sure thing!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Sure thing!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Sure thing!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Oops?! I ruined it again.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Oops?! I ruined it again.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Oops?! I ruined it again.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'm sorry. I wanted to make you a pretty cocktail, but I can't seem to make a float today.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'm sorry. I wanted to make you a pretty cocktail, but I can't seem to make a float today.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'm sorry. I wanted to make you a pretty cocktail, but I can't seem to make a float today.

root.m_Talk_ENG: That's no reason to throw out a good cocktail. Give it here.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That's no reason to throw out a good cocktail. Give it here.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That's no reason to throw out a good cocktail. Give it here.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Huh? Are you sure about that? It's all mixed up, so it won't taste that great.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Huh? Are you sure about that? It's all mixed up, so it won't taste that great.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Huh? Are you sure about that? It's all mixed up, so it won't taste that great.

root.m_Talk_ENG: It's all right. Mixed or not, I'll get drunk either way.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It's all right. Mixed or not, I'll get drunk either way.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It's all right. Mixed or not, I'll get drunk either way.

root.m_Talk_ENG: If you insist...
root.m_Talk_DEU: If you insist...
root.m_Talk_FRA: If you insist...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Oh! What you said just now, does it also have a deeper meaning?!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Oh! What you said just now, does it also have a deeper meaning?!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Oh! What you said just now, does it also have a deeper meaning?!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Just like getting drunk on ruined drinks, even confusing experiences are still worth something?!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Just like getting drunk on ruined drinks, even confusing experiences are still worth something?!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Just like getting drunk on ruined drinks, even confusing experiences are still worth something?!

root.m_Talk_ENG: No... I didn't imply anything like that...
root.m_Talk_DEU: No... I didn't imply anything like that...
root.m_Talk_FRA: No... I didn't imply anything like that...

root.m_Talk_ENG: R-really? Oh...
root.m_Talk_DEU: R-really? Oh...
root.m_Talk_FRA: R-really? Oh...

root.m_Talk_ENG: But I'm sure this ruined cocktail has its own charm.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But I'm sure this ruined cocktail has its own charm.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But I'm sure this ruined cocktail has its own charm.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'm lucky to have met a bartender like you, Ms. Nicole.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'm lucky to have met a bartender like you, Ms. Nicole.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'm lucky to have met a bartender like you, Ms. Nicole.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Thank you, sir!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Thank you, sir!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Thank you, sir!
